cards.historyText: Wizard Of Many Colours belongs to the company of noteworthy figures whose favor is rarely free but often valuable to those who show discernment.

outcomes.resultText: Wizard Of Many Colours answers your request with real help.
Wizard Of Many Colours offers a small kindness and sends you on.
Wizard Of Many Colours respects your bearing.
Wizard Of Many Colours finds your effort lacking.
You read more in Wizard Of Many Colours than first appeared.
The meeting passes with little gained.
You move on before Wizard Of Many Colours has any hold on your path.
